title: Don’t give up on the Syracuse Citizen Review Board without a fight (Editorial Board Opinion)
summary: Editorial board opinion piece advocates for Syracuse city government to actively defend the Syracuse Citizen Review Board, framing police accountability as a mission requiring sustained institutional commitment rather than passive acceptance of the board's potential dissolution.

political_signal.description: Editorial board championing survival and institutional support of citizen oversight body; implicit criticism of city government passivity regarding police accountability mechanisms

processing_notes: Article is opinion/editorial rather than news report; framed as normative argument about institutional values
No specific policy proposals, budget impacts, or legislative actions mentioned
Suggests potential governance tension regarding SCRB status or resources not detailed in excerpt
May indicate trending constituent pressure or council debate on SCRB continuation
